headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Deserves a Second Chance and 2 That Underwhelm

headline: This Is Why ASML Is a No-Brainer Buy Before July 15 Earnings
summary: Own ASML Holding (NASDAQ:ASML) before the opening bell on July 15 when the company reports Q2 results and almost certainly reiterates a raised full-year outlook the market is still underpricing.
